title: Basic JavaScript Operators
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Operators. Focus on implementing Arithmetic operators (+, -, *, /, %, **) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Operators
description: Create a function that uses Arithmetic operators (+, -, *, /, %, **) and Assignment operators (=, +=, -=, etc.) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Operators Project
description: Build a small application that applies Arithmetic operators (+, -, *, /, %, **), Assignment operators (=, +=, -=, etc.), Comparison operators (==, ===, !=, !==, >, <) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Operators
description: The following code has bugs related to Arithmetic operators (+, -, *, /, %, **). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Operators
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Arithmetic operators (+, -, *, /, %, **) and Assignment operators (=, +=, -=, etc.).
